description: You can execute these commands from the CLI, as part of an automation, or in a playbook. After you successfully execute a command, a DBot message appears in the War Room with the command details.

outputs.description: Unique ID of the Anomaly to track in Linkshadow Linkshadow.data.action_time Date
outputs.name: Linkshadow.data.GlobalID

outputs.description: Linkshadow.data.anomaly_flag Anomaly Flag Value 1 - Means Active Anomaly, 0 Means Fixed Anomaly Linkshadow.data.anomaly_id
outputs.name: Time of Anomaly Send to XSOAR

outputs.description: Anomaly ID for LinkShadow Linkshadow.data.anomaly_type Incident Type
outputs.name: Number

outputs.description: Bandwidth usage of the Anomalous session Linkshadow.data.category Additional Information for the anomaly
outputs.name: Linkshadow.data.bandwidth

outputs.description: Time of Anomaly seen Linkshadow.data.desc Description of anomaly from linkshadow
outputs.name: Linkshadow.data.data

outputs.description: Destination Ip in the detected anomaly Linkshadow.data.dmac Destination mac address
outputs.name: Linkshadow.data.dip

outputs.description: Destination port number of the anomalous session Linkshadow.data.id NA
outputs.name: Linkshadow.data.dport

outputs.description: Date Time of Anomaly added to the database Linkshadow.data.score
outputs.name: Linkshadow.data.inserted_time

outputs.description: Risk Score of the Anomaly - Typical value between 1-20 Linkshadow.data.sip Source IP in the detected Anomaly
outputs.name: Number

outputs.description: Source Mac Address in the detected Anomaly Linkshadow.data.sport Source port number of the anomalous session
outputs.name: Linkshadow.data.smac

outputs.description: Date Time of Anomaly seen Edit this page
outputs.name: Linkshadow.data.time_seen
